title: Research Objective
Not allowed at prediction time

name: s3-bottom
text: Evaluation uses measured runtimes; prediction does not.
textPreview: Evaluation uses measured runtimes; prediction does not.

name: native-title-unified
text: Prediction is made before any candidate algorithm is executed
textPreview: Prediction is made before any candidate algorithm is executed

title: Algorithm Selection Problem
System Architecture

name: s6-note
text: Real data was preferred because synthetic distributions failed to converge to genuine structure.
textPreview: Real data was preferred because synthetic distributions failed to converge to genuine structure.

name: native-title-unified
text: The corpus uses five structurally diverse real-world domains
textPreview: The corpus uses five structurally diverse real-world domains

title: Stock market

title: Where this selector can be used

name: title
text: Where this selector can be used
textPreview: Where this selector can be used

name: row-1-text
text: Database query engines: choose sorting method for ORDER BY, joins, grouping, and index builds
textPreview: Database query engines: choose sorting method for ORDER BY, joins, grouping, and index builds

name: row-2-text
text: ETL and analytics pipelines: choose sorting method for IDs, timestamps, prices, partitions, and batches
textPreview: ETL and analytics pipelines: choose sorting method for IDs, timestamps, prices, partitions, and batches

name: row-3-text
text: Search and ranking systems: choose sorting method for candidate scores before top-k output
textPreview: Search and ranking systems: choose sorting method for candidate scores before top-k output

name: row-4-text
text: Financial time-series processing: choose sorting method for rolling windows, events, prices, and order-book values
textPreview: Financial time-series processing: choose sorting method for rolling windows, events, prices, and order-book values

name: row-5-text
text: Scientific and telemetry processing: choose sorting method for sensor traces, physics logs, weather data, and F1 telemetry
textPreview: Scientific and telemetry processing: choose sorting method for sensor traces, physics logs, weather data, and F1 telemetry

name: row-6-text
text: Selector action: extract features first, predict fastest algorithm, choose Introsort / Heapsort / Timsort
textPreview: Selector action: extract features first, predict fastest algorithm, choose Introsort / Heapsort / Timsort

name: fixed-title
text: Where this selector can be used
textPreview: Where this selector can be used

name: native-title-unified
text: Where this selector can be used
textPreview: Where this selector can be used

title: The contribution is a selector and an evaluation discipline

name: native-title-unified
text: The contribution is a selector and an evaluation discipline
textPreview: The contribution is a selector and an evaluation discipline

name: row-text-1
text: A deployable selector: compact pipeline combines sixteen O(n) structural features with a gradient-boosted classifier
textPreview: A deployable selector: compact pipeline combines sixteen O(n) structural features with a gradient-boosted classifier

name: row-text-2
text: A rigorous evaluation framework: source-level separation, near-tie filtering, LODO testing, and regret metrics give a stronger view than accuracy alone
textPreview: A rigorous evaluation framework: source-level separation, near-tie filtering, LODO testing, and regret metrics give a stronger view than ...

name: row-text-3
text: A reproducible artifact: one source-of-truth feature extractor, data pipeline, and exported XGBoost JSON / ONNX models support replication
textPreview: A reproducible artifact: one source-of-truth feature extractor, data pipeline, and exported XGBoost JSON / ONNX models support replication

title: The remaining errors show where the features stop seeing

name: native-title-unified
text: The remaining errors show where the features stop seeing
textPreview: The remaining errors show where the features stop seeing

name: row-text-1
text: Portfolio: limited to three C-level comparison sorts
textPreview: Portfolio: limited to three C-level comparison sorts

name: row-text-2
text: Environment: absolute regret is tied to one hardware/software environment
textPreview: Environment: absolute regret is tied to one hardware/software environment

name: row-text-3
text: Source-aware split: stricter validation lowers performance, so deployment needs domain testing
textPreview: Source-aware split: stricter validation lowers performance, so deployment needs domain testing

name: row-text-4
text: Extraction cost: feature extraction becomes unprofitable below about 1,000 elements
textPreview: Extraction cost: feature extraction becomes unprofitable below about 1,000 elements

name: row-text-5
text: Larger portfolios: Powersort, radix/bucket/quads, SIMD/GPU sorts
textPreview: Larger portfolios: Powersort, radix/bucket/quads, SIMD/GPU sorts

name: row-text-6
text: Channel validation: stricter channel-level routing evaluation
textPreview: Channel validation: stricter channel-level routing evaluation

name: row-text-7
text: Domain routing: domain embeddings and stricter channel-level routing evaluation
textPreview: Domain routing: domain embeddings and stricter channel-level routing evaluation

name: row-text-8
text: Deployment: cross-platform deployment with feature-extraction overhead
textPreview: Deployment: cross-platform deployment with feature-extraction overhead
